name: Global Payments

seo.title: Global Payments — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: Global Payments: Global Payments — Multinational payment technology company providing acquiring, issuing, and commerce solutions in 100+ countries.

when_to_use: Multinational acquiring and payment processing for enterprise retail
Omnichannel payment acceptance across 100+ countries via single contract
Integrated commerce solutions combining POS, gateway, and acquiring globally
Issuing, acquiring, and value-added payment services for large enterprises

review.verdict: Solid for global enterprises with traditional acquiring needs — not a modern developer-first choice.
review.best_for: Global enterprises needing broad acquiring and issuing in many countries
review.not_for: Startups or teams valuing fast modern developer experience

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact-sales pricing; no explicit peak-lock evidence.
